description: An integrity engineer plans an inline inspection (ILI) run using a 'smart pig' to assess the condition of a major natural gas pipeline.

nodes.task_description: Review the pipeline's characteristics (diameter, length, known bends) to select the appropriate ILI tool technology (e.g., MFL, UT).

expected_outcome.expected: The engineer selects a high-resolution MFL tool as the most suitable technology.

nodes.task_description: Develop an operational plan for the pig run, including flow rate adjustments needed to run the tool at its optimal speed.

expected_outcome.expected: A detailed plan is created, specifying the required operational changes.

nodes.task_description: Book the ILI vendor and schedule the run in the operational calendar.

expected_outcome.expected: The vendor and the run date are confirmed and scheduled.
